title: Long Tasks, Compaction, Steering, and Handoffs
description: Keep a multi-hour repository task coherent across context changes and user steering. Learners cumulatively produce a durable task state and handoff record through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Maintain objective, decisions, evidence, plan status, changed files, tests, and blockers in a compact state.
Store durable task details in files or structured summaries before context compaction.
Distinguish messages that change the active run from follow-up work that should wait.
